query:
SELECT 'animals' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS n FROM animals
UNION ALL SELECT 'apps', COUNT(*) FROM apps
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignments', COUNT(*) FROM assignments
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions', COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'auditLog', COUNT(*) FROM auditLog
UNION ALL SELECT 'books', COUNT(*) FROM books
UNION ALL SELECT 'careTeam', COUNT(*) FROM careTeam
UNION ALL SELECT 'curriculumTopics', COUNT(*) FROM curriculumTopics
UNION ALL SELECT 'kidRequests', COUNT(*) FROM kidRequests
UNION ALL SELECT 'kidActivities', COUNT(*) FROM kidActivities
UNION ALL SELECT 'moods', COUNT(*) FROM moods
UNION ALL SELECT 'prizes', COUNT(*) FROM prizes
UNION ALL SELECT 'rewards', COUNT(*) FROM rewards
UNION ALL SELECT 'subjects', COUNT(*) FROM subjects
UNION ALL SELECT 'tutors', COUNT(*) FROM tutors
UNION ALL SELECT 'tutorSessions_scheduled', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tutorSessions WHERE status='scheduled')
UNION ALL SELECT 'tutorSessions_cancelled', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tutorSessions WHERE status='cancelled')
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users;
